evals.prompt: download Japanese subtitles for minna no nihongo lesson 26
evals.expected_output: SRT subtitle files from top 5 YouTube search results for 'minna no nihongo lesson 26', saved to subtitles/{channel_name}/{video_title}.ja.srt, with manual captions preferred over auto-generated. Summary report listing which succeeded (manual vs auto) and which were skipped.

evals.prompt: get the Japanese subs from this video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lEVAIyfVzXM
evals.expected_output: Single SRT subtitle file from the specified YouTube video, saved to subtitles/{channel_name}/{video_title}.ja.srt, with manual captions preferred over auto-generated. Report indicating whether it succeeded and caption type.

evals.prompt: I need Japanese subtitles for top 3 results of Japanese N4 listening practice
evals.expected_output: SRT subtitle files from top 3 YouTube search results for 'Japanese N4 listening practice', saved to subtitles/{channel_name}/{video_title}.ja.srt, with manual captions preferred over auto-generated. Summary report for exactly 3 videos.
